title: Resolution Requesting the Relief Operations of Both the Local Government Unit and Barangay Government to Give Priority to Indigent Senior Citizens and Persons with Disability (PWDS) As Well As Daily Wage Earners (E.G. JEEPNEY DRIVERS, TODA MEMBERS, PODA MEMBERS, STREET VENDORS, CONSTRUCTION WORKERS), Aster Farmers, Displaced Workers and Others Who Belong to Sectors Greatly Affected by the Imposition of Enhanced Community Quarantine Due to Corona Virus Disease 2019 (COVID-19). (AUTHOR(S): Council
